notes: Default gravity deck for the Hierophant / BBS room. Mixes online beats (a handle logs in, the printer jams) with in-person beats (the alley door opens, the kettle boils).

deck.title: a handle dials in
deck.flavor: a handle you know logs in. their greeting line is short tonight.

deck.title: the printer jams
deck.flavor: the dot-matrix sticks. the post in progress is half-printed.

deck.title: a floppy pops loose
deck.flavor: the drive ejects the floppy you weren't done with.

deck.title: the alley door opens
deck.flavor: somebody you didn't expect to see came in person.

deck.title: the kettle clicks off
deck.flavor: the kettle is ready. the couch corner gets a coffee.

deck.title: the ham band clears
deck.flavor: 14.230 has gone quiet. 14.301 has gone live.

deck.title: a long post comes in
deck.flavor: two thousand words land in your inbox at once.

deck.title: the lurker pauses
deck.flavor: the lurker's cursor blinks. they have been about to post for ten minutes.

deck.title: the signal settles
deck.flavor: the room is humming. you can hear the modem rack singing.

deck.title: the archive serves up
deck.flavor: you reach for a floppy and it's the right floppy.

deck.title: a new handle
deck.flavor: a registration request from a handle you've never seen.

deck.title: the BBS goes quiet
deck.flavor: all four modems on standby for five minutes straight.

deck.title: the signal holds
deck.flavor: every modem is still up. every thread is still active. for thirty seconds the BBS is what it should always be.
